ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flights" (
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight */,
  "flight_number" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the flight */,
  "airline_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airline operating the flight */,
  "depart_airport" TEXT /* Name of the airport where the flight departs */,
  "arrive_airport" TEXT /* Name of the airport where the flight arrives */,
  "depart_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "depart_day_type" TEXT /* Type of day when departure occurs (e.g., Friday) */,
  "arrive_day_type" TEXT /* Type of day when arrival occurs (e.g., Friday) */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the ticket */,
  "aircraft_type" TEXT /* Type of aircraft used for the flight */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the flight in hours */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Class of the cabin (e.g., Economy, Business, First) */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the ticket before any dynamic adjustments */,
  "dynamic_price_factor" REAL /* Factor used to adjust the base price dynamically */,
  "available_seats" INTEGER /* Number of available seats on the flight */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the flight record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_arrive_airport FOREIGN KEY ("arrive_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_airline_id FOREIGN KEY ("airline_id") REFERENCES airline_info ("info_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flights_depart_airport FOREIGN KEY ("depart_airport") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "iata_code" TEXT /* IATA code of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "airport_name" TEXT /* Name of the airport */,
  "location" TEXT /* City or region where the airport is located */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the airport */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight being booked */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the booking */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date when the booking was made */,
  "ticket_cost" REAL /* Final cost of the ticket at the time of booking */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Class of the cabin booked */,
  "seat_number" TEXT /* Seat number assigned to the customer */,
  "booking_status" TEXT /* Status of the booking (e.g., Confirmed, Pending, Canceled) */,
  "booking_source" TEXT /* Source of the booking (e.g., Website, Mobile App, Call Center) */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Number of passengers in the booking */,
  "frequent_flyer_points_used" INTEGER /* Points used from the frequent flyer program */,
  "frequent_flyer_points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned from this booking */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "account_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequent_flyer_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequent flyer program entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer associated with the program */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the customer */,
  "membership_level" TEXT /* Membership level (e.g., Silver, Gold, Platinum) */,
  "points_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the points will expire */,
  "status_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the membership level will expire */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity in the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_frequent_flyer_programs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment transaction */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the payment transaction */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking associated with the payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of money paid */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, PayPal) */,
  "processor_response_code" TEXT /* Response code from the payment processor */,
  "processor_response_message" TEXT /* Message from the payment processor */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., Success, Failed, Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellations" (
  "cancellation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation transaction */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking that was cancelled */,
  "cancellation_date" TEXT /* Date of the cancellation */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded to the customer */,
  "cancellation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the cancellation (e.g., Personal, Weather, Airline) */,
  "cancellation_status" TEXT /* Status of the cancellation (e.g., Refund Processed, Refund Pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cancellation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cancellations_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role (e.g., Admin, Agent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_password_change_date" TEXT /* Date of the last password change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "flight_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight associated with the analytics data */,
  "booking_count" INTEGER /* Number of bookings for the flight */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the flight */,
  "average_cost" REAL /* Average cost of tickets sold for the flight */,
  "cancellation_count" INTEGER /* Number of cancellations for the flight */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given by customers for the flight */,
  "most_common_complaint" TEXT /* Most common complaint from customer feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_flight_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_id") REFERENCES flights ("flight_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airline_info" (
  "info_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the airline info record */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airline */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the airline's headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for customer inquiries */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the airline */,
  "foundation_date" TEXT /* Date when the airline was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the airline */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("info_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "booking_id" INTEGER /* ID of the booking related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1 to 5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "flight_date" TEXT /* Date of the flight for which the feedback is given */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Service, Food, Comfort) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_booking_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_id") REFERENCES bookings ("booking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Booking Confirmation, Cancellation) */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the notification has been read by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
